title: Benchmark Document
description: A legal document record for the legal-reference-extraction benchmark.

raw.description: Document content in the declared format.

text.description: Canonical plain-text projection of the document.

source_profile.description: Normaliser profile name used to produce the plain-text projection.

source.description: URL or identifier of the original document source.

decision_type.description: Type of decision, e.g. Urteil, Beschluss.

license.description: License under which the document is distributed.
